title:
Module 10
Continued on Discord
subtitle: Advanced Training, NSFW Content, and Community Support

blocks.content: Before moving to advanced content on Discord, verify that you have completed every step in Modules 1-9. Each item on this checklist is a building block. Skipping any of them creates a weak link that will break under pressure. Go through this list honestly — if anything is incomplete, go back and finish it before moving forward.

items: Niche and persona selected based on market demand
Name chosen and username available across all platforms
Base model generated using Seedream 4.5 and Nano Banana 2
Seed image selected and saved at full resolution
Face consistency confirmed across multiple test generations
Content library built: 30+ images sorted into categories
Reference image workflow tested and producing consistent results
Prompt templates saved for each content category
Editing workflow established (artifact fix, grain addition)
Kling account set up with credits loaded
Video generation tested in Standard and Professional modes
At least 5 finished video clips ready for posting
Video editing workflow established (CapCut or DaVinci Resolve)
Dedicated phone or device set up for persona
SIM card and phone number acquired
VPN configured and set to US location
Instagram account created and profile configured
Threads account linked to Instagram
TikTok account created (no profile details yet — Day 1 rules)
Telegram channel created and configured
All accounts warming up according to protocol
Instagram warmup completed (21-28 days)
TikTok warmup completed (9 days)
Threads posting active and driving Instagram profile visits
First Reels posted with trending audio
Content posting schedule established and followed consistently
Geo targeting signals active (English, US timing, US location tags)
Audience demographics checked and healthy (60%+ English-speaking)
Daily safety habits established and non-negotiable
Content backup system in place (local + cloud)
Metrics monitoring routine active (daily reach, engagement, story views)
Twitter/X shadowban status checked and green
Instagram Account Status checked and clean
Backup account warming up on separate device
Link-in-bio page created (AllMyLinks or Linktree, max 2-3 links)
Subscription platform page set up with banner, bio, and initial content
Pricing strategy set ($7-$15/month base, promotional discount active)
Telegram channel producing content on schedule
Automated welcome messages configured and tested
Instagram highlight with link sticker created
Funnel links activated (only after 3+ weeks of stable engagement)

blocks.title: Completion Standard
blocks.content: If you cannot check off every item above, you are not ready for advanced content. Go back to the relevant module and finish it. The foundation must be solid before you scale into advanced strategies. Half-built foundations collapse under weight.

sections.header: Lesson 2: Your First 30 Days Action Plan

blocks.content: This is the exact sequence of actions for your first 30 days, organized week by week. Follow this plan in order. Do not skip ahead. Each week builds on the previous one. Print this out and check items off as you complete them.

items: Day 1-2: Choose niche, name, and persona (Module 1-2)
Day 2-3: Generate base model using Seedream 4.5 and Nano Banana 2
Day 3-4: Test face consistency with reference workflow
Day 4-5: Begin building content library (target 15+ images)
Day 5-6: Generate first Kling video clips (3-5 clips)
Day 6-7: Set up phone, SIM card, VPN, and all apps
Day 7: Create Instagram account and configure profile

left.title: Week 1 Goal
left.content: By end of Week 1: Base model locked, 15+ images generated, 3+ video clips created, Instagram account created. You should be ready to begin warmup.

items: Day 8-9: Continue building content library (target 30+ total images)
Day 8: Create TikTok account (follow Day 1 rules — empty, no details)
Day 9-14: Instagram warmup — scroll, like, follow, watch (Module 5)
Day 9-14: TikTok warmup — Day 1-7 protocol from Module 5
Day 10: Create Telegram channel and prepare 5-10 initial posts
Day 11: Create link-in-bio page (AllMyLinks or Linktree)
Day 12-14: Set up subscription platform page with banner, bio, 5-10 posts
Day 14: Generate additional video clips for posting backlog

left.title: Week 2 Goal
left.content: By end of Week 2: 30+ images in library, all accounts created, warmup in progress on all platforms, subscription page ready with content, Telegram channel prepared.

items: Day 15-16: First Instagram carousel posts (2-3 SFW, face-focused)
Day 15-21: Continue Instagram warmup engagement daily
Day 16: TikTok warmup complete — begin posting (1-2 per day)
Day 17: Start Threads posting (1-2 posts per day, text-based)
Day 18-19: First Instagram Stories (daily, casual, lifestyle)
Day 20: Scale Threads to 3-4 posts per day
Day 21: Instagram warmup minimum complete — evaluate metrics
Day 21: Begin Twitter/X warmup if bandwidth allows

right.title: Week 3 Goal
right.content: By end of Week 3: Content flowing on Instagram and TikTok. Threads active and driving profile visits. Growth signals visible in Instagram Insights. Ready to activate funnel links.

items: Day 22: Add link in bio on Instagram (only if engagement is stable)
Day 22: Create Instagram highlight with link sticker
Day 22-28: Begin posting Instagram Reels daily (one per day minimum)
Day 23: Activate Telegram posting schedule (2-3 posts per day)
Day 24: Configure automated welcome messages
Day 25-28: Scale posting cadence across all platforms
Day 28: Review all metrics — reach, engagement, profile visits, audience demographics
Day 28-30: First subscriber conversions should begin arriving

right.title: Week 4 Goal
right.content: By end of Week 4: Full funnel active. Reels posting daily. Telegram funnel warming followers. Link in bio live. First subscriber conversions beginning. System is operational.

blocks.title: After Day 30
blocks.content: Day 30 is not the finish line — it is the starting line. Your system is now operational. From here, your daily job is: generate content, post consistently, engage with your audience, monitor metrics, and optimize what works. The real growth happens in Months 2-6 as your systems compound. Keep going.

sections.header: Lesson 3: What Comes Next on Discord

blocks.content: Congratulations on completing Modules 1-9 and your first 30 days. You now have the complete foundation: model creation, content pipeline, platform growth, account safety, and monetization systems. Everything you need to launch and run a profitable AI influencer business is in your hands.

Module 10 continues on Discord. The advanced training covers content and strategies that go beyond what can be delivered in a static PDF format. The Discord community is where the real-time learning happens.

left.content: What You Will Find on Discord

items: NSFW image and video creation techniques and workflows
Advanced content strategies that push beyond SFW
Chat systems and revenue optimization strategies
Live Q&A sessions and real-time support from experienced operators
Community of operators sharing strategies, results, and lessons learned
Template libraries, prompt databases, and shared resources
Direct feedback on your pages from experienced operators
Platform update alerts when rules or algorithms change

right.content: Advanced strategies and NSFW content require a platform that allows open discussion without content restrictions. Discord provides the privacy, flexibility, and real-time interaction that this material demands.

This industry evolves constantly. Platform rules change, new AI tools launch, and strategies that work today may need adjustment tomorrow. Discord allows the community to stay current in a way that static PDFs cannot. When Instagram changes its algorithm or a new AI video tool launches, the Discord community adapts in real time.
How to Get the Most from Discord

items: Introduce yourself and share your current progress
Ask specific questions — vague questions get vague answers
Share your results (wins and failures) — the community learns from both
Review other operators' pages and offer feedback
Stay active — the most successful operators are the most engaged in the community
Check the announcements channel weekly for platform updates and strategy changes

right.title: How to Join
right.content: Access to the Discord server is included with your course purchase. Check your purchase confirmation email for the invite link. If you do not have it, reach out to support.

blocks.title: Final Rule
blocks.content: Make sure you have completed Modules 1-9 and have your first page fully operational before jumping into advanced content. The fundamentals must be solid before you scale. Build the foundation first. Everything advanced is built on top of what you learned here.

summary_points: Complete the full checklist from Modules 1-9 before moving to advanced content — no shortcuts
Week 1: Build foundation (model, content library, device setup)
Week 2: Create all accounts, begin warmup, prepare subscription page and Telegram
Week 3: Start posting on Instagram and TikTok, activate Threads, growth signals begin
Week 4: Activate funnel links, start Reels daily, first subscriber conversions arrive
Day 30 is the starting line, not the finish line — real growth happens in Months 2-6
Discord continues with NSFW content, chat systems, advanced strategies, and real-time community support
The most successful operators stay active in the community and share both wins and failures
